title: sabina mexicana
intro: Sabina mexicana, also known as Mexican sage or Salvia mexicana, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and parts of Central America. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sabina mexicana include relieving stress, improving digestion, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Sabina mexicana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety.
